name: Fernleaf Philodendron Temperature Constraints
description: Ensures Fernleaf Philodendron is kept within its safe temperature range (64.4°F - 82.4°F).
response_pass: Safe! Room temperature is optimal for Fernleaf Philodendron.
response_fail: CRITICAL: Fernleaf Philodendron requires temperature between 64.4°F and 82.4°F.
